output.final_deliverable:
1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com: NOT PRESENT in the provided visit result — the merged visit for https://example.com did not include the page’s H1 text.

2) Exact domain of the external link from https://example.com: iana.org (the visit result lists the external link https://iana.org/domains/example).

3) One URL citation for each visited page:
   - https://example.com
   - https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved
output.action_summary: The merged visit results include an external link from https://example.com to https://iana.org/domains/example, which yields the domain iana.org. The exact H1 text for https://example.com was not included in the provided visit content, so that item is missing from the evidence. Citations for the two visited pages are: https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved.

3c705e75-31f1-416c-8cda-7197bc51f4c5.title: Visit example.com and extract H1 text, external link domain, and citation

details.intent: Retrieve exact H1 text from the page, find the domain of the first external link on the page, and produce a single URL citation for this page.

target_facts.example_h1_text: exact text of the first <h1> element (string)
target_facts.example_external_link_domain: exact domain (including subdomain, e.g., www.iana.org) of the first external anchor href found on the page (string)
target_facts.citation_url: the canonical URL to cite for this page (should be https://example.com)

details.extraction_plan: Fetch the full HTML for https://example.com. Parse DOM and: (1) locate the first <h1> element and capture its inner text exactly, preserving whitespace and punctuation; (2) locate the first <a> element whose href's effective domain is not example.com (external link), extract the exact domain portion of that href (include subdomain if present); (3) record the page URL as the citation. Return these fields exactly as found.
verification_steps: Confirm HTTP 200 and that the page content contains at least one <h1> element; if none, note missing H1.
Confirm the chosen anchor's href is absolute or resolve relative URLs against the page URL before extracting domain.
Ensure the extracted domain is taken directly from the href (do not normalize or drop subdomain unless it is absent).
Include the exact visited URL as the citation.
details.why_this_reduces_uncertainty: Directly visiting the page ensures we capture the exact H1 text and the actual external link target (not guessed). The steps and verification ensure accuracy and exact-string extraction.
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.
details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.
